audience: Owners, marketers and communications teams at SMEs planning one corporate video with aerial and ground footage
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's helpen drone- en grondbeelden als één inhoudelijk en visueel samenhangende bedrijfsvideo voorbereiden, opnemen, monteren en publiceren

searchIntent.question: How do you combine drone footage and ground footage into one coherent corporate video?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Businesses in Belgium, subject to current Belgian and European drone rules

mainKeyword: combine drone footage with corporate video
directAnswer: Give each perspective a clear job: use aerial footage for location, scale, routes and transitions, and ground cameras for people, processes, detail, interviews and natural sound. Plan both in one script and shot list while treating the flight as a separate operational activity.
title: How to combine drone footage with corporate video
metaDescription: Combine drone and ground footage in one corporate video with a shared script, shot list, flight plan, continuity, privacy checks and channel-specific edits.
h1: How to combine drone footage with corporate video: one story from the air to the shop floor
factsToPreserve: A drone flight remains a separate operational activity within the production
Current flight conditions and geozones must be assessed for every operation
No flight above an assembly of people in the Open category
The stated general maximum is 120 metres above the closest point of the earth's surface
Video and structured data do not guarantee rankings or video results
